name: Chocolate Mint Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the measuring cup into the mix and level off; allow it to come to room temperature.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
4. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips, stirring constantly until smooth.
5. In a large bowl, combine the mix, melted chocolate chips, chopped nuts, vanilla extract, and eggs at low speed just until blended.
6. Spread the mixture evenly in the greased pan.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until set.
8. Immediately arrange the mints on top of the brownies; return them to the oven.
9. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes, allowing the softened mints to spread evenly over the brownie surface.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
